# InputGroup

A wrapper component that groups an Input with start and end elements or addons, such as icons, text, or buttons positioned inside or alongside the input.

## Import

```jsx
import { InputGroup } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `startElement` | `ReactNode` | - | Element to render at the start (left) of the input |
| `endElement` | `ReactNode` | - | Element to render at the end (right) of the input |
| `startElementProps` | `object` | - | Additional props for the start element wrapper |
| `endElementProps` | `object` | - | Additional props for the end element wrapper |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | The Input component to wrap |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### With start element (icon)

```jsx
import { LuSearch } from "react-icons/lu";

<InputGroup startElement={<LuSearch />}>
  <Input placeholder="Search..." />
</InputGroup>
```

### With end element

```jsx
import { LuMail } from "react-icons/lu";

<InputGroup endElement={<LuMail />}>
  <Input placeholder="Email" />
</InputGroup>
```

### With both elements

```jsx
import { LuDollarSign, LuInfo } from "react-icons/lu";

<InputGroup startElement={<LuDollarSign />} endElement={<LuInfo />}>
  <Input placeholder="Amount" />
</InputGroup>
```

### With text addons

```jsx
<InputGroup startElement="https://">
  <Input placeholder="www.example.com" />
</InputGroup>
```

### With element props

```jsx
<InputGroup
  startElement={<LuSearch />}
  startElementProps={{ color: "gray.500" }}
>
  <Input placeholder="Search..." />
</InputGroup>
```

## Features

- Positions elements inside the input field at start or end positions
- Accepts any React node as start or end elements (icons, text, buttons)
- Automatically adjusts input padding to accommodate elements
- Customizable element wrapper props for fine-grained styling
- Forwards refs to the root element
